primary: AWS (EC2, S3, SES, RDS, SNS, SQS, Route53)

projects.name: https://ourshopee.com
achievements: Tech Stack: Node.js, Elasticsearch, MySQL, AWS (SQS, S3), ReactJS, Bull Queue, Docker, CI/CD.
Architected and scaled backend infrastructure for a high-concurrency e-commerce platform serving the GCC region, driving core API development and complex relational database design.
Engineered a centralized Order Management System (OMS) and CRM in Node.js, implementing business logic for automated invoice generation, shipping label processing, and return/replacement eligibility.

Designed event-driven, asynchronous processing architectures utilizing AWS SQS and Bull Queue for high-throughput tasks, including cron-driven scheduling and strict message deduplication for FIFO queues.
Integrated ZIWO IVR systems for automated customer call flows, building robust retry management (3-call limit logic) and secure webhook payload processing.
Engineered a bidirectional data synchronization pipeline between the internal OMS and Zoho CRM via REST APIs, ensuring real-time consistency of customer profiles.

projects.name: https://aurumwisex.com

Established secure, modular API endpoints adhering to SOLID principles to support the ReactJS frontend, incorporating strict data validation and global error handling.
Integrated Kafka for event-driven, asynchronous data streaming and utilized MongoDB for flexible, high-performance financial data modeling.

workExperience.companyDescription: Ourshopee is a leading Marketplace platform in the Middle East, offering a wide range of products and services.

workExperience.companyDescription: GreenHonchos is a full-stack D2C enabler, an ecommerce agency that provides end-to-end ecommerce solutions for D2C brands including digital branding.
